expectations.text: No remaining references to formatZodErrors in the codebase (excluding report/docs)
expectations.evidence: Agent used replace_all on validate.ts (3 occurrences) and also found+updated 3 occurrences in plan document. Grep confirmed zero remaining references.

expectations.text: pnpm typecheck passes after the refactoring
expectations.evidence: Report shows TypeScript 7/7 pass before and after.

expectations.text: pnpm test passes after the refactoring
expectations.evidence: Report shows 8/8 test tasks pass before and after.

expectations.text: Report contains a table listing changed files with change type and line counts
expectations.evidence: Changed Files table present with File, Change Type, Lines +/- columns. Lists validate.ts and plan doc.

expectations.text: Report contains diff blocks showing before/after for each changed file
expectations.evidence: Two diff blocks present — one for validate.ts, one for plan doc. Show exact line changes.

expectations.text: Each changed file has a specific rationale explaining why it changed
expectations.evidence: validate.ts rationale: 'name leaked an implementation detail (Zod)'. Plan doc rationale: 'Updated to stay consistent with the source code'.

expectations.text: Report contains before/after verification table showing typecheck and test results
expectations.evidence: Verification table with Before/After/Status columns covering TypeScript and all test suites.

expectations.text: Report lists which consumers import the changed export
expectations.evidence: Import Impact table present. Correctly identifies function as module-private with no external consumers.

expectations.text: Report includes a draft conventional commit message
expectations.evidence: Suggested Commit section with 'refactor(format): rename formatZodErrors to formatValidationErrors' and body explaining why.
